zh.name: 工作可视化
zh.description: 将Hermes Agent的工作过程可视化 - 包括任务进度、技能使用、代码改动、会话统计等

features.task_progress: 任务进度追踪 - 实时查看当前任务完成情况
features.work_stats: 工作统计分析 - 了解技能使用频率、工具调用次数等
features.code_changes: 代码改动追踪 - 可视化代码编辑历史和影响范围
features.session_summary: 会话总结 - 自动生成工作摘要和关键指标
features.performance_monitor: 性能监控 - 监控AI工作的效率和资源使用

en.name: Work Visualization
en.description: Visualize Hermes Agent's work process - including task progress, skill usage, code changes, session statistics, and more

features.task_progress: Task Progress Tracking - View current task completion status in real-time
features.work_stats: Work Statistics Analysis - Understand skill usage frequency, tool call counts, etc.
features.code_changes: Code Change Tracking - Visualize code editing history and impact scope
features.session_summary: Session Summary - Automatically generate work summaries and key metrics
features.performance_monitor: Performance Monitoring - Monitor AI work efficiency and resource usage
